name: sigma-team
description: Team Jay Sigma — meta orchestrator for 9 teams, 122 agents

scripts.check:library:full: export SIGMA_V2_ENABLED=true SIGMA_LIBRARY_AUTONOMY_MODE=autonomous SIGMA_TEAM_MEMORY_UNIFIED=true SIGMA_KNOWLEDGE_GRAPH_ENABLED=true SIGMA_DATASET_BUILDER_ENABLED=true SIGMA_DATA_LINEAGE_ENABLED=true SIGMA_LIBRARY_DASHBOARD_ENABLED=true SIGMA_TIER2_AUTO_APPLY=true SIGMA_SELF_RAG_ENABLED=true SIGMA_GEPA_ENABLED=true SIGMA_MULTI_HOP_RAG_ENABLED=true SIGMA_HYDE_ENABLED=true SIGMA_MCP_SERVER_ENABLED=true SIGMA_SELF_IMPROVEMENT_ENABLED=true SIGMA_VOYAGER_SKILL_AUTO_EXTRACTION=true SIGMA_FINE_TUNING_NOTIFY_ENABLED=true SIGMA_DATASET_AUTO_EXPORT=true SIGMA_CONSTITUTION_VIOLATION_AUTO_BLOCK=true SIGMA_PII_REDACTION_ENABLED=true SIGMA_SENSITIVE_EXPORT_BLOCKED=true SIGMA_CONSTITUTION_ENABLED=true; tsx scripts/sigma-intelligent-library-smoke.ts && tsx scripts/sigma-library-full-smoke.ts && tsx scripts/runtime-sigma-dataset-builder.ts --week=2026w18 && tsx scripts/runtime-sigma-self-improvement.ts && tsx scripts/runtime-sigma-library-dashboard.ts --json --quiet && tsx scripts/sigma-final-activation-smoke.ts
